changeSet.author: openelis-tmmrd
changeSet.comment: Create localization entries for TMMRD test sections

changeSet.author: openelis-tmmrd
changeSet.comment: Create main TMMRD test sections per SRS Section 4

column.name: name_localization_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.localization WHERE description = 'tmmrd test section botanical' LIMIT 1)

column.name: name_localization_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.localization WHERE description = 'tmmrd test section phytochem' LIMIT 1)

column.name: name_localization_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.localization WHERE description = 'tmmrd test section analytical' LIMIT 1)

column.name: name_localization_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.localization WHERE description = 'tmmrd test section biological' LIMIT 1)

column.name: name_localization_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.localization WHERE description = 'tmmrd test section safety' LIMIT 1)

column.name: name_localization_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.localization WHERE description = 'tmmrd test section product qc' LIMIT 1)

column.name: name_localization_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.localization WHERE description = 'tmmrd test section formulation' LIMIT 1)

changeSet.author: openelis-tmmrd
changeSet.comment: Create localization entries for TMMRD tests

column.name: test_section_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.test_section WHERE name = 'TMMRD_BOTANICAL')

column.name: name_localization_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.localization WHERE english = 'Morphological Authentication' AND description = 'test name' LIMIT 1)

column.name: test_section_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.test_section WHERE name = 'TMMRD_BOTANICAL')

column.name: name_localization_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.localization WHERE english = 'Microscopic Authentication' AND description = 'test name' LIMIT 1)
